---
title: "Langley School. By the author of “The Kings of England.” Reprinted from the Magazine for the Young."
---

## Langley School. By the author of “The Kings of England.” Reprinted from the Magazine for the Young.

**By Charlotte Mary Yonge**

**Published:** 1850
**Genre:** Fiction
**Format:** Book

**Publisher:** John and Charles Mozley, Paternoster Row, London, and Joseph Masters, New Bond Street, London.

### Notes

Twenty-seven Langley stories were published in the <i>Magazine for the Young</i> of which fifteen were reprinted in <i>Langley School.</i>

---

[← Back to all letters](../../letters.html)
